/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ar qc libMaximumSubarrayProblemLib.a CMakeFiles/MaximumSubarrayProblemLib.dir/BruteForce.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MaximumSubarrayProblemLib.dir/DivideAndConquer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/MaximumSubarrayProblemLib.dir/KadanesAlgorithm.cpp.o
/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/ranlib libMaximumSubarrayProblemLib.a
